welcome.title: Beam Bench is free
welcome.subtitle: It's made possible by our other projects. Take a look and help keep it going.
welcome.craftgineer_tagline: Pro design tools, no learning curve
welcome.craftgineer_description: Turn photos into clean vectors, convert between formats, and create custom designs. Ready to make, no technical skills needed.
welcome.printcutcarve_description: Premium, ready-to-make designs for your laser, cutter, or printer. No cleanup, commercial license included.

update.no_notes: No release notes were provided for this update.
update.blocked_not_in_applications: Updates need Beam Bench to run from the Applications folder. It looks like it is running from the installer disk image or another temporary location. In Finder, drag Beam Bench into Applications, open it from there, and try the update again.
update.blocked_other_disk: Beam Bench is installed on a different disk than this Mac's temporary folder, so the updater cannot swap it in place. Move Beam Bench to the Applications folder on the main disk, or download the new version from beambench.com.

help.grayscale: Variable-power grayscale for photos and materials that respond well to tonal changes.
help.threshold: Pure black and white output for line art and logos.
help.floyd_steinberg: Classic error-diffusion dithering for photographs with soft tonal gradients.
help.ordered_dither: Bayer-matrix ordered dither. Fast and repeatable, with a visible pattern.
help.stucki: Stucki error diffusion uses a wider kernel for smoother tonal gradients.
help.jarvis: Jarvis-Judice-Ninke error diffusion preserves detail in high-resolution photos.
help.sierra: Sierra error diffusion balances Floyd-Steinberg speed with smoother tones.
help.atkinson: Atkinson dithering keeps crisp edges and higher contrast.
help.halftone: Ordered-dither approximation of a printer halftone screen.
help.newsprint: Ordered-dither approximation of a newsprint screen.
help.sketch: Experimental pencil-sketch effect; use Floyd-Steinberg or Stucki for most photos.
